Tradeway
How it works Join early
Step into your local trading network

Trade what you have for what you need.

Tradeway helps people exchange skills, services, and everyday items — with the option to balance value using cash. If it has value, you can trade it.

Become a Founding TraderSee trade examples
FlexibleTrade, trade + cash, or make an offer
Local firstStart near you and build outward
Pre-loadedLaunch day starts with real intent
What can you trade?

Anything with value.

Tradeway is built for real life. Some trades are direct. Some need cash to balance value. The point is simple: use what you already have to get what you need.

Oil change → custom wood shelf
Trading cards → car parts
Lawn care + $20 → tool set
Cash → help from someone local
Categories

Not just one kind of trade.

🚗 Auto & Car Parts
🎴 Collectibles & Trading Cards
🧠 Skills & Lessons
🏡 Home & Services
🍞 Food & Homemade Goods
📦 Everyday Items
How launch works

We are pre-loading the marketplace before launch.

A normal waitlist collects emails. Tradeway collects intent — what people have, what they need, and where they can trade.

1. Create your founding trader profile
2. List what you have and what you want
3. Choose your trade radius
4. Launch day starts with trades already forming
M
Mike has auto help
Wants handmade goods or shelf work
S
Sarah has lawn care
Wants meals, pantry items, or small cash balance
A
Alex has trading cards
Wants car parts or collectible swaps
Founding trader waitlist

Set up your trade before launch.

Tell us what you have and what you’re looking for. When Tradeway goes live, your trade can already be part of the marketplace.

Trades can be direct or include cash to balance value.

You’re in. Your trade profile is ready.

When Tradeway launches, this can be pre-loaded into the marketplace.
